title: CIRCIA Annual SLA & KPI Review — board-level review of reporting performance, miss rates, and remediation actions
exclusions: Excludes interim reviews triggered by an actual incident (those are post-incident reviews, governed by tabletop UC-22.54.24). Excludes statutory reviews under SEC or NERC (those follow separate KPI cadences). Excludes ad hoc reviews requested for M&A due diligence.
evidence: Saved search `UC-22.54.28` archived monthly to `audit_evidence` with `circia_clause="CIRCIA-CISA-tabletop"` and `circia_clause="CIRCIA-CISA-incident-classification"`. Every row pins (review_id, review_year, kpi_72hr_sla_met, kpi_24hr_sla_met, kpi_supplemental_sla_met, kpi_classification_sla_met, kpi_retention_sla_met, board_review_at, board_review_signed_by, kpi_status). Dashboard `CIRCIA — Annual SLA KPI Review` shows the rolling 5-year KPI trend.

compliance.assurance_rationale: Annual KPI review complements the annual tabletop by quantifying real-world reporting performance.
compliance.controlObjective: Proves the entity reviews its CIRCIA-SLA performance at board level at least annually and acts on findings.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search `UC-22.54.28` archived to `audit_evidence`, the `CIRCIA — Annual SLA KPI Review` dashboard, and the board-minute extract.

compliance.assurance_rationale: Classification SLA is one of the KPIs reviewed.
compliance.controlObjective: Inherits the control objective from the primary compliance entry on this UC; this is a secondary mapping covering the same evidence chain.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Inherited from the primary compliance entry: saved search archived to audit_evidence with regulatory clause tag, dashboard, SOAR case file, and evidence pack.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Skip the annual KPI review for the current FY; UC-22.54.28 MUST flag `kpi_status="annual_review_overdue"` within 14 days of FY-end.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Conduct annual review with board signed minute capturing the five KPIs; UC-22.54.28 MUST record `kpi_status="current"`.

dataSources: Aggregate of all CIRCIA UCs' summary metrics in `audit_evidence`. KV Store `circia_kpi_review_lookup`. ServiceNow GRC for board-meeting tracking.
app: Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (Splunkbase 1621).
spl:
| inputlookup circia_kpi_review_lookup
| eval now_ts = now()
| eval fy_end_at = strptime(review_year . "-12-31", "%Y-%m-%d")
| eval days_since_fy_end = round((now_ts - fy_end_at) / 86400, 0)
| eval kpi_status = case(
    review_year < tonumber(strftime(now_ts, "%Y")) - 1 AND isnull(board_review_at), "annual_review_overdue",
    isnull(board_review_at) AND days_since_fy_end > 60, "annual_review_overdue",
    isnull(board_review_at), "annual_review_pending",
    isnull(board_review_signed_by), "annual_review_unsigned",
    1=1, "current")
| where kpi_status != "current"
| table review_id review_year kpi_72hr_sla_met kpi_24hr_sla_met kpi_supplemental_sla_met kpi_classification_sla_met kpi_retention_sla_met board_review_at board_review_signed_by kpi_status
description: Tracks the annual board-level review of CIRCIA-SLA KPIs. Surfaces overdue or unsigned reviews.
value: Quantitative performance review at board level closes the loop on CIRCIA programme maturity. Without it, the entity has no objective measure of whether the programme is improving over time.
implementation: (1) SOAR `circia-kpi-prefill` runs at FY-end and aggregates the five KPIs into a draft review row. (2) CISO presents to board cyber-risk committee. (3) Board signs minute; row is updated. (4) Schedule UC-22.54.28 monthly.
visualization: (Panel 1) Rolling 5-year KPI trend. (Panel 2) Annual review status. (Panel 3) Year-over-year delta on each KPI. (Panel 4) Remediation-action tracking from past reviews.

references.title: NACD Cyber Risk Oversight — KPI Best Practices

knownFalsePositives:
1. **Board cadence offset** — some boards meet on FY+90 day cadence; review may be done within Q1 of the new FY. Suppression: extend grace to 90 days post-FY-end.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `circia_22_54_28_exceptions` with documented Corporate Secretary approval and 60-day maximum grant.
reviewer: CIRCIA Compliance SME Panel + Corporate Secretary + CISO
equipmentModels: Splunk Enterprise Security 7.x (Splunkbase 263, audit_evidence summary index)
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- Splunk Enterprise ≥9.2 or Splunk Cloud.
- KV Store `circia_kpi_review_lookup`.
- SOAR `circia-kpi-prefill`.

## Step 1 — Review collection

```ini
[circia_kpi_review_lookup]
enforceTypes = true
field.review_id = string
field.review_year = number
field.kpi_72hr_sla_met = number
field.kpi_24hr_sla_met = number
field.kpi_supplemental_sla_met = number
field.kpi_classification_sla_met = number
field.kpi_retention_sla_met = number
field.board_review_at = number
field.board_review_signed_by = string
field.remediation_actions = string
```

## Step 2 — Prefill playbook

`circia-kpi-prefill` runs at FY-end (12/31) and writes a row with each KPI aggregated.

## Step 3 — Search and alert

```ini
[UC-22.54.28: CIRCIA Annual SLA KPI Review]
cron_schedule = 0 6 1 * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -3y@y
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.54.28,reg=CIRCIA
action.notable.param.rule_title = CIRCIA annual KPI review overdue or unsigned
action.notable.param.security_domain = audit
action.notable.param.severity = medium
alert.severity = 3
```

## Step 4 — Operationalize

**Runbook for `annual_review_overdue`** (owner: CISO, severity P3): within 30 days schedule and conduct review; document.

## Step 5 — Troubleshooting

**CIRCIA-specific failure modes**:

- **Negative KPI trend**: if KPIs decline year-over-year, the board must direct remediation. Track actions in `remediation_actions` field.
- **Multi-year baseline**: provide 3-year baseline so single-year anomalies don't drive over-reaction.
grandmaExplanation: Once a year, the company shows its board of directors: 'how well did our cyber-incident reporting machine work this year?' We track 5 numbers (deadlines met, on-time reports, complete records). The board signs the report and tells us what to improve next year.
